title: Notifications - Onboarding - Don't Allow, dialog
scenario: Notifications toggle in App Settings shows OS redirect dialog when re-enabled after being denied during onboarding
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. During onboarding, when prompted for Notifications permission, select "Don't Allow".
5. Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or profile icon to access App Settings.
6. Go to App Settings > General > Notifications.
7. Tap the toggle to turn Notifications ON.
expected: The Notifications toggle should turn ON, or the app should gracefully handle the permission state without showing a confusing dialog.
